content:
Stories (continued) — HRREC-82977

StoryGap score (%)PM lensQA lensXO lensVerdictSuggested missing BDD (Given/When/Then)

HRREC-92001
PH: Recruiter sees the panel expand and views full message when clicking the grow button or clicking a single message

38% — PM slice value clear; QA tenant limits; XO catalog present but per-hook proof still SUV work.

  • Jira — PH: Recruiter sees the panel expand and views full message when clicking the grow button or clicking a single message: confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Recruiting Communications / tenant templates: blank-body risk when subject or body missing or template overrides recruiter draft (internal precedent on grid sends).
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-92001 (PH: Recruiter sees the panel expand and views full …): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Exercise negatives implied by PH: Recruiter sees the panel expand and views full message when click…: record tenant SKU (SSP growth) and mail lane used.
  • Salomon — Email Analytics may reject empty subject lines—pair blank-body template issues with vendor status rows when reproducing.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-92001 (PH: Recruiter sees the panel expand and views full …): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-92001: PH: Recruiter sees the panel expand and views full message when clicking the grow butto… — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched cl: Conversation (and related conversational UI classes) as anchor for thread container work.
  • XO MCP — risk: vendor mail rejections may surface as generic errors—pair UI copy with vendor status rows.
  • Finding: HRREC-92001 — Edge cases (slow network, double submit) are implied more than written—false-positive bug risk until spelled out.
  • Recommended next step: Run one cross-browser smoke on the primary path after each merge train batch for this epic.

Scenario: REST parity spot-check (key-specific)
Given tenant staged for HRREC-92001 with logged mail mode
When the recruiter performs the behaviour described in: Recruiter sees the panel expand and views full message when clicking the grow button or c…
Then UI, persisted thread state, and captured network payloads align for this slice

HRREC-92002
PH: Style only - Recruiter sees messages showing styled as per figma

38% — PM slice value clear; QA tenant limits; XO catalog present but per-hook proof still SUV work.

  • Jira — PH: Style only - Recruiter sees messages showing styled as per figma: confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Purge: Recruiting Communications PDT removes conversation messages, participants, recruiting email attachments, notification events—align recruiter-visible UI after purge with privacy comms.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-92002 (PH: Style only - Recruiter sees messages showing st…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Exercise negatives implied by PH: Style only - Recruiter sees messages showing styled as per figma: record tenant SKU (SSP growth) and mail lane used.
  • Salomon — Email Analytics may reject empty subject lines—pair blank-body template issues with vendor status rows when reproducing.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-92002 (PH: Style only - Recruiter sees messages showing st…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-92002: PH: Style only - Recruiter sees messages showing styled as per figma — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched cl: Conversation Message (+ Derived, Status, Sender) for delivery tags, read/unread, purge visibility.
  • XO MCP — risk: duplicate REST paths for similar compose actions—assert the exact endpoint used by this UI path.
  • Finding: HRREC-92002 — Cross-story overlap on compose/send paths—risk of conflicting mocks unless QE shares one baseline tenant recipe.
  • Recommended next step: Document tenant limits (attachment size, recipient count) beside UI acceptance text.

Scenario: REST parity spot-check (key-specific)
Given tenant staged for HRREC-92002 with logged mail mode
When the recruiter performs the behaviour described in: Style only - Recruiter sees messages showing styled as per figma
Then UI, persisted thread state, and captured network payloads align for this slice

HRREC-92003
PH: Recruiter sees error messages if their email has bounced

40% — QA failure-injection vs PM copy clarity vs XO vendor event mapping.

  • Jira — PH: Recruiter sees error messages if their email has bounced: confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Agency / UDMF: duplicate agency submissions depend on BP CRF vs UDMF-aware rule; isolation tests need explicit internal vs agency accounts.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-92003 (PH: Recruiter sees error messages if their email ha…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Exercise negatives implied by PH: Recruiter sees error messages if their email has bounced: record tenant SKU (SSP growth) and mail lane used.
  • Salomon — Email Analytics may reject empty subject lines—pair blank-body template issues with vendor status rows when reproducing.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-92003 (PH: Recruiter sees error messages if their email ha…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-92003: PH: Recruiter sees error messages if their email has bounced — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched Recruiting Email PRU/PU paths (Candidate Email create, External/Internal candidate parms) for send/receive wiring.
  • XO MCP — risk: notification fan-out may differ by tenant SKU—log growth vs core when reproducing.
  • Finding: HRREC-92003 — REST parity is plausible but unproved in Jira—capture one HAR-backed happy path before widening coverage.
  • Recommended next step: Add one SUV screenshot or short clip for the primary happy path to stabilise review.

Scenario: REST parity spot-check (key-specific)
Given tenant staged for HRREC-92003 with logged mail mode
When the recruiter performs the behaviour described in: Recruiter sees error messages if their email has bounced
Then UI, persisted thread state, and captured network payloads align for this slice

  • Salomon — Agency / UDMF: duplicate agency submissions depend on BP CRF vs UDMF-aware rule; isolation tests need explicit internal vs agency accounts.
